text: In this world of blurred vision, I am enveloped by uncertainty and ambiguity. The first image feels like a shroud of confusion—dark, undefined, indefinite. The second is an emergence, a pale glow piercing through obscurity, inviting hope while still veiling clarity. Here, I find myself contemplating beginnings and endings—how understanding dawns out of the fog, and yet, how much remains hidden from my grasp. I feel curious and contemplative, balanced on the edge between knowing and not.
